result.reason: The SSH session window (PuTTYNG) does not automatically adjust its size when the parent mRemoteNG window is resized, requiring an update to the process control and window management.
result.approach: Add a method to `ProcessController.cs` to resize the external PuTTYNG window using P/Invoke (SetWindowPos/MoveWindow from `NativeMethods.cs`). Override the resize event in the relevant mRemoteNG UI window (e.g., `BaseWindow` descendant) to get the new dimensions and pass them to the `ProcessController`'s resize method.
